items.title: Tangent line as linear approximation
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  curve["y = f(x)"] --> point["point (x, f(x))"]
  point --> tangent["tangent slope f prime(x)"]
  tangent --> approx["f(x+h) approx f(x) + f prime(x) h"]
items.caption: The derivative gives the best linear approximation to f near x.

items.title: Derivative sign and monotonicity
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  pos["f prime greater than 0"] --> up["f increasing"]
  neg["f prime less than 0"] --> down["f decreasing"]
  zero["f prime equals 0"] --> crit["critical point: possible min/max"]
items.caption: Sign of f′ tells whether the function rises or falls; zeros locate critical points for optimization.
